name: io.github.Ankur-stockheads/rubo-mcp
title: UK Break Clause Analyzer
description: Assess UK lease tenant break clauses with grounded citations and a measured hallucination rate.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for live LLM extraction/reasoning. Without it the server runs in a heuristic-only fallback mode.
